hooks.command: $sprintFile = Get-ChildItem -Path '.' -Recurse -Filter 'sprint-status.yaml' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; $storyFile = Get-ChildItem -Path '.' -Recurse -Filter '*.md' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { (Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -match 'Status: in-progress' } | Select-Object -First 1; $msgs = @(); if ($sprintFile) { $content = Get-Content $sprintFile.FullName -Raw; $inProgress = [regex]::Matches($content, 'in-progress'); $readyForDev = [regex]::Matches($content, 'ready-for-dev'); $msgs += "Sprint: $($inProgress.Count) in-progress, $($readyForDev.Count) ready-for-dev" }; if ($storyFile) { $msgs += "Active story: $($storyFile.Name)" }; if ($msgs.Count -gt 0) { $msg = $msgs -join ' | '; Write-Output "{`"systemMessage`": `"$msg`"}" }

$handoff = Get-ChildItem -Path '.' -Filter 'handoff-*.md' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; $msgs = @(); if ($handoff) { $age = (Get-Date) - $handoff.LastWriteTime; if ($age.TotalHours -lt 8) { $msgs += "Handoff up to date: $($handoff.Name)" } else { $msgs += "HANDOFF NOT UPDATED: Update handoff-*.md or run WDS /wrap before closing." } } else { $msgs += 'NO HANDOFF FILE: Create a handoff file before closing.' }; $msgs += 'CLAUDE.md tip: if you discovered a convention, gotcha, or tooling quirk this session that is not in any CLAUDE.md, add it now while context is fresh.'; $msg = $msgs -join ' | '; Write-Output "{`"systemMessage`": `"$msg`"}"
